jobs.title: SAP Business Continuity Service Manager
jobs.description: ABOUT US Founded in 1910 in Trivero, Italy, the Ermenegildo Zegna Group (NYSE:ZGN) is a global luxury company with a leading position in the high-end menswear business. Through its three complementary brands, the Group reaches a wide range of communities and market segments across the high-end fashion industry, from ZEGNAâ€™s timeless luxury to the modern tailoring of Thom Browne, to seductive elegance with TOM FORD FASHION. The Ermenegildo Zegna Group is internationally recognized for its unique Filiera, owned and controlled by the Group, which is made up of the finest Italian textile producers fully integrated with unique luxury manufacturing capabilities, ensuring superior excellence, quality, and innovation. The Group employs more than 7,100 people worldwide. YOUR OPPORTUNITY The SAP Business Continuity Service Manager plays a pivotal role within the IT Business Continuity team, ensuring the endâ€‘toâ€‘end stability, integration, and continuity of the SAP S/4HANA platform and the broader application landscape supporting the companyâ€™s core business processes. The role requires constant engagement with vertical SAP teams responsible for firstâ€‘level Application Management Services (AMS), as well as close collaboration with the SAP CoE Manager to guarantee performance, reliability, and scalability across the SAP ecosystem. The position also oversees external AMS thirdâ€‘party suppliers and service partners, ensuring alignment with internal standards, operating guidelines, and contractual commitments. In addition, the SAP Business Continuity Service Manager leads an internal Governance team that oversees key operational pillars, including the ServiceNow ticketing platform, account management services, testing automation tools, application transport management, and all endâ€‘user communications related to planned and unplanned maintenance activities. As part of the Business Continuity team, the SAP Service Manager will actively contribute to the SAP RISE migration roadmap, coordinate crossâ€‘functional workstreams, supervise Integration and User Acceptance Testing and ensure seamless alignment between internal stakeholders and external implementation partners. The role will be based in Stabio (Switzerland). HOW YOU BRING IT TO LIFE Provide leadership and oversight for SAP S/4HANA service delivery teams across application modules, interfaces, and hybrid/cloud environments. Lead the Governance team (covering ServiceNow, Testing Automation, Account and Release Management). Coordinate with thirdâ€‘party suppliers and service partners to maintain process consistency, efficiency, and quality ensuring availability and continuity in line with corporate SLAs. Ensure effective execution and continuous enhancement of Business Continuity processes (Support Request, Incident, Problem, and Change Management), compliant with SOX standards. Manage external vendors and service providers contracts, overseeing KPI performance and contractual compliance through structured review sessions. Support strategic project initiatives by delivering Business Continuity Makeâ€‘mode services to other IT teams, ensuring alignment with IT Stream Leaders and the Demand function, and guaranteeing the quality and risk governance of all deliverables. WHO YOU ARE Technical & Professional Skills Strong expertise in SAP S/4HANA, with solid understanding of key functional modules and SAP technical architecture Proven experience managing complex SAP environments, ideally in hybrid and/or cloud-based contexts, with a strong orientation toward service quality Exposure to SAP RISE and/or large SAP transformation or migration programs with a strong innovation mindset Solid knowledge of SAP integrations with external systems (APIs, middleware, EDI, cloud services) Deep familiarity with ITIL practices and enterprise service management frameworks and IT process oversight Experience with ServiceNow ticketing platforms is considered a plus Background in Fashion & Luxury industry is a plus Experience 3â€“5 years of experience in similar roles within structured corporate IT organizations and/or consulting companies Soft Skills Strong leadership and stakeholder management capabilities Structured, governance-oriented mindset with high attention to service quality Ability to operate effectively in complex, cross-functional environments Proactive, reliable, and comfortable managing multiple priorities Education Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Management Engineering, or other STEM disciplines (equivalent SAP-related experience may be considered) Languages Good knowledge of English, written and spoken Mobility Willingness to travel occasionally for business needs

descriptionByLocale.en:
## About Us
Founded in 1910 in Trivero, Italy, the Ermenegildo Zegna Group (NYSE:ZGN) is a global luxury company with a leading position in the high-end menswear business. Through its three complementary brands, the Group reaches a wide range of communities and market segments across the high-end fashion industry, from ZEGNAâ€™s timeless luxury to the modern tailoring of Thom Browne, to seductive elegance with TOM FORD FASHION. The Ermenegildo Zegna Group is internationally recognized for its unique Filiera, owned and controlled by the Group, which is made up of the finest Italian textile producers fully integrated with unique luxury manufacturing capabilities, ensuring superior excellence, quality, and innovation. The Group employs more than 7,100 people worldwide.

## Your Opportunity
The SAP Business Continuity Service Manager plays a pivotal role within the IT Business Continuity team, ensuring the endâ€‘toâ€‘end stability, integration, and continuity of the SAP S/4HANA platform and the broader application landscape supporting the companyâ€™s core business processes. The role requires constant engagement with vertical SAP teams responsible for firstâ€‘level Application Management Services (AMS), as well as close collaboration with the SAP CoE Manager to guarantee performance, reliability, and scalability across the SAP ecosystem. The position also oversees external AMS thirdâ€‘party suppliers and service partners, ensuring alignment with internal standards, operating guidelines, and contractual commitments. In addition, the SAP Business Continuity Service Manager leads an internal Governance team that oversees key operational pillars, including the ServiceNow ticketing platform, account management services, testing automation tools, application transport management, and all endâ€‘user communications related to planned and unplanned maintenance activities. As part of the Business Continuity team, the SAP Service Manager will actively contribute to the SAP RISE migration roadmap, coordinate crossâ€‘functional workstreams, supervise Integration and User Acceptance Testing and ensure seamless alignment between internal stakeholders and external implementation partners. The role will be based in Stabio (Switzerland).

## How You Bring It To Life
- Provide leadership and oversight for SAP S/4HANA service delivery teams across application modules, interfaces, and hybrid/cloud environments
- Lead the Governance team (covering ServiceNow, Testing Automation, Account and Release Management)
- Coordinate with thirdâ€‘party suppliers and service partners to maintain process consistency, efficiency, and quality ensuring availability and continuity in line with corporate SLAs
- Ensure effective execution and continuous enhancement of Business Continuity processes (Support Request, Incident, Problem, and Change Management), compliant with SOX standards
- Manage external vendors and service providers contracts, overseeing KPI performance and contractual compliance through structured review sessions
- Support strategic project initiatives by delivering Business Continuity Makeâ€‘mode services to other IT teams, ensuring alignment with IT Stream Leaders and the Demand function, and guaranteeing the quality and risk governance of all deliverables

## Who You Are
### Technical & Professional Skills
- Strong expertise in SAP S/4HANA, with solid understanding of key functional modules and SAP technical architecture
- Proven experience managing complex SAP environments, ideally in hybrid and/or cloud-based contexts, with a strong orientation toward service quality
- Exposure to SAP RISE and/or large SAP transformation or migration programs with a strong innovation mindset
- Solid knowledge of SAP integrations with external systems (APIs, middleware, EDI, cloud services)
- Deep familiarity with ITIL practices and enterprise service management frameworks and IT process oversight
- Experience with ServiceNow ticketing platforms is considered a plus
- Background in Fashion & Luxury industry is a plus

### Soft Skills
- Strong leadership and stakeholder management capabilities
- Structured, governance-oriented mindset with high attention to service quality
- Ability to operate effectively in complex, cross-functional environments
- Proactive, reliable, and comfortable managing multiple priorities

### Education
- Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Management Engineering, or other STEM disciplines (equivalent SAP-related experience may be considered)

### Languages
- Good knowledge of English, written and spoken

### Mobility
- Willingness to travel occasionally for business needs
descriptionByLocale.it: Fondato nel 1910 a Trivero, Italia, il Gruppo Ermenegildo Zegna (NYSE:ZGN) Ă¨ una societĂ  di lusso globale con una posizione di primo piano nel business menswear di fascia alta. Attraverso i suoi tre marchi complementari, il Gruppo raggiunge una vasta gamma di comunitĂ  e segmenti di mercato in tutto il settore della moda di fascia alta, dal lusso senza tempo di ZEGNA alla moderna sartoria di Thom Browne, alla seducente eleganza con TOM FORD FASHION. Il Gruppo Ermenegildo Zegna Ă¨ riconosciuto a livello internazionale per la sua unica Filiera, di proprietĂ  e controllata dal Gruppo, costituito dai migliori produttori tessili italiani pienamente integrati con capacitĂ  produttive di lusso uniche, garantendo un'eccellenza, qualitĂ  e innovazione superiore. Il Gruppo impiega piĂą di 7,100 persone in tutto il mondo. # Your Opportunity Il SAP Business Continuity Service Manager svolge un ruolo fondamentale nel team IT Business Continuity, assicurando la stabilitĂ , lâ€™integrazione e la continuitĂ  della piattaforma SAP S/4HANA e il panorama delle applicazioni piĂą ampio che supporta i processi aziendali fondamentali dellâ€™azienda. Il ruolo richiede un costante impegno con i team SAP verticali responsabili dei servizi di gestione delle applicazioni di primo livello (AMS), nonchĂ© una stretta collaborazione con SAP CoE Manager per garantire prestazioni, affidabilitĂ  e scalabilitĂ  in tutto l'ecosistema SAP. La posizione supervisiona anche fornitori e partner di servizi esterni AMS di terze parti, garantendo l'allineamento con gli standard interni, le linee guida operative e gli impegni contrattuali. Inoltre, il SAP Business Continuity Service Manager guida un team di governance interna che supervisiona i principali pilastri operativi, tra cui la piattaforma di ticketing ServiceNow, i servizi di gestione account, gli strumenti di test di automazione, la gestione dei trasporti delle applicazioni e tutte le comunicazioni degli utenti finali relative alle attivitĂ  di manutenzione pianificate e non pianificate. Nell'ambito del team Business Continuity, SAP Service Manager contribuirĂ  attivamente alla roadmap di migrazione SAP RISE, coordina i flussi di lavoro interfunzionali, supervisiona l'integrazione e l'accettazione degli utenti e garantisce un allineamento senza interruzioni tra gli stakeholder interni e i partner di implementazione esterni. Il ruolo si baserĂ  a Stabio (Svizzera). ## How You Bring It To Life - Fornire leadership e supervisione per i team di assistenza SAP S/4HANA attraverso moduli applicativi, interfacce e ambienti ibridi/cloud - Lead the Governance team (covering ServiceNow, Testing Automation, Account and SAP Release Management) - Coordinate con i fornitori di servizi di terze parti
descriptionByLocale.de: Ăśber uns GegrĂĽndet 1910 in Trivero, Italien, ist die Ermenegildo Zegna Group (NYSE:ZGN) ein globales Luxusunternehmen mit einer fĂĽhrenden Position im High-End-MĂ¤nnchengeschĂ¤ft. Durch die drei komplementĂ¤ren Marken erreicht die Gruppe ein breites Spektrum an Gemeinschaften und Marktsegmenten in der High-End-Modebranche, von ZEGNAs zeitlosem Luxus bis hin zur modernen Anpassung von Thom Browne bis hin zur verfĂĽhrerischen Eleganz mit TOM FORD FASHION. Die Ermenegildo Zegna Gruppe ist international anerkannt fĂĽr ihre einzigartige Filiera, die im Besitz und unter Kontrolle der Gruppe ist, die aus den feinsten italienischen Textilherstellern besteht, die vollstĂ¤ndig mit einzigartigen Luxus-ProduktionskapazitĂ¤ten integriert sind, um hĂ¶chste Exzellenz, QualitĂ¤t und Innovation zu gewĂ¤hrleisten. Die Rolle erfordert ein stĂ¤ndiges Engagement mit vertikalen SAP-Teams, die fĂĽr First-Level Application Management Services (AMS) verantwortlich sind, sowie eine enge Zusammenarbeit mit dem SAP CoE Manager, um Leistung, ZuverlĂ¤ssigkeit und Skalierbarkeit im gesamten SAP-Ă–kosystem zu gewĂ¤hrleisten. Die Position ĂĽberwacht auch externe AMS-Lieferanten und Servicepartner von Drittanbietern und gewĂ¤hrleistet eine Angleichung an interne Standards, Betriebsleitlinien und vertragliche Verpflichtungen. DarĂĽber hinaus fĂĽhrt der SAP Business Continuity Service Manager ein internes Governance-Team, das die wichtigsten operativen SĂ¤ulen ĂĽberwacht, einschlieĂźlich der ServiceNow Ticketing-Plattform, Account Management-Services, Testautomatisierungstools, Application Transport Management und allen Endnutzer-Kommunikationen im Zusammenhang mit geplanten und nicht geplanten WartungsaktivitĂ¤ten. Im Rahmen des Business Continuity-Teams wird der SAP Service Manager aktiv zum SAP RISE Migrationsplan beitragen, funktionsĂĽbergreifende ArbeitsablĂ¤ufe koordinieren, Integration und User Acceptance Testing ĂĽberwachen und eine nahtlose Ausrichtung zwischen internen Stakeholdern und externen Implementierungspartnern gewĂ¤hrleisten. Die Rolle wird in Stabio (Schweiz) getragen. # Informieren Sie sich ĂĽber das Management von SAP-Diensten und -Verwalten von SAP-Diensten und -Verwalten von IT-Diensten in verschiedenen Anwendungsmodulen, Schnittstellen und hybriden/Cloud-Umgebungen - FĂĽhren Sie das Governance-Team (Covering ServiceNow, Testing Automation, Account and Release Management)

jobs.title: IT Sales Project Manager
jobs.description: ABOUT US Founded in 1910 in Trivero, Italy, the Ermenegildo Zegna Group (NYSE:ZGN) is a global luxury company with a leading position in the high-end menswear business. Through its three complementary brands, the Group reaches a wide range of communities and market segments across the high-end fashion industry, from ZEGNAâ€™s timeless luxury to the modern tailoring of Thom Browne, to seductive elegance with TOM FORD FASHION. The Ermenegildo Zegna Group is internationally recognized for its unique Filiera, owned and controlled by the Group, which is made up of the finest Italian textile producers fully integrated with unique luxury manufacturing capabilities, to ensure superior excellence, quality and innovation capacity. The Ermenegildo Zegna Group has more than 7,100 employees worldwide. YOUR OPPORTUNITY As an IT Sales Project Manager, you will join the IT Direct to Consumer team and play a key role in the global retail transformation journey, impacting over 300 stores worldwide. You will work on the evolution of the global POS ecosystem based on Oracle Retail Xstore, contributing to the development of scalable, omnichannel retail solutions and enhancing the in-store customer experience across markets. You will act as a bridge between business needs and technical implementation, working closely with internal stakeholders and external partners in a dynamic and international environment. * The role will be based in Stabio (Switzerland) or alternatively in Milano / Lomazzo HOW YOU BRING IT TO LIFE Collect, analyze and prioritize business requirements, translating them into functional specifications and scalable technical solutions Act as a key interface between business, IT teams and external vendors, ensuring alignment and effective delivery Oversee the implementation and evolution of the global POS core model (Oracle Xstore), including country localizations and compliance with VAT and taxation requirements Coordinate and supervise integrations with internal enterprise systems and third-party platforms Support global POS roll-outs and system enhancements across the store network Guide external partners and system integrators through implementation phases, ensuring quality and timelines Deliver user training and provide ongoing support on new tools, features and functionalities You will operate across multiple streams, from transformation projects to ongoing system evolutions and enhancements, contributing to continuous improvement initiatives within the retail ecosystem. WHO YOU ARE Technical & Professional Skills Strong knowledge of Oracle Retail Xstore Suite (Xstore, Xstore Mobile, Xoffice Cloud) Good understanding of system integrations within complex IT ecosystems Knowledge of Oracle DB and SQL is a plus Knowledge of OROB / ORCE, Java, XML is a plus Experience in supervising software development and system customization projects Familiarity with cloud-based solutions and automation / AI technologies is considered a plus Experience in troubleshooting, user support and training delivery Experience 3â€“5 years of experience on Oracle Retail Xstore Suite / POS solutions Experience in global roll-outs, system implementations and customization projects Background in complex, structured and fast paced environments Soft Skills Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills Ability to work effectively in a global, cross-functional environment Proactive, structured and able to manage multiple priorities Comfortable working under pressure and tight timelines Confident in presenting technical topics to both technical and non-technical audiences Education Masterâ€™s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science or similar Languages Fluent English, written and spoken (daily interaction with international markets required)

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione INFORMAZIONI SU US Fondato nel 1910 a Trivero, Italia, il Gruppo Ermenegildo Zegna (NYSE:ZGN) Ă¨ un'azienda globale di lusso con una posizione di primo piano nel settore dell'abbigliamento maschile di alto livello. Attraverso i suoi tre marchi complementari, il Gruppo raggiunge una vasta gamma di comunitĂ  e segmenti di mercato nell'industria della moda di alto livello, dal lusso senza tempo di ZEGNA alla moderna sartoria di Thom Browne, fino all'eleganza seducente con TOM FORD FASHION. Il Gruppo Ermenegildo Zegna Ă¨ riconosciuto a livello internazionale per la sua unica Filiera, di proprietĂ  e controllata dal Gruppo, composta dai migliori produttori tessili italiani pienamente integrati con capacitĂ  produttive di lusso uniche, per garantire eccellenza, qualitĂ  e capacitĂ  di innovazione superiori. Il Gruppo Ermenegildo Zegna conta piĂą di 7.100 dipendenti in tutto il mondo. LA TUA OPPORTUNITĂ€ Come Project Manager IT Sales, entrerai a far parte del team IT Direct to Consumer e giocherai un ruolo chiave nel percorso globale di trasformazione del retail, con un impatto su oltre 300 negozi in tutto il mondo. Lavorerai sull'evoluzione dell'ecosistema globale POS basato su Oracle Retail Xstore, contribuendo allo sviluppo di soluzioni retail omnicanale scalabili e migliorando l'esperienza cliente in negozio su tutti i mercati. Agirai come ponte tra le esigenze aziendali e l'implementazione tecnica, lavorando a stretto contatto con stakeholder interni e partner esterni in un ambiente dinamico e internazionale. * Il ruolo avrĂ  sede a Stabio (Svizzera) oppure in alternativa a Milano / Lomazzo COME DARGLI VITA - Raccogliere, analizzare e prioritizzare i requisiti aziendali, traducendoli in specifiche funzionali e soluzioni tecniche scalabili - Agire come interfaccia chiave tra business, team IT e fornitori esterni, garantendo allineamento e consegna efficace - Supervisionare l'implementazione e l'evoluzione del modello globale di core POS (Oracle Xstore), inclusa la localizzazione per paese e la conformitĂ  ai requisiti di IVA e fiscalitĂ  - Coordinare e supervisionare le integrazioni con sistemi aziendali interni e piattaforme di terze parti - Supportare il lancio globale di POS e i miglioramenti di sistema in tutta la rete store - Guidare partner esterni e integratori di sistema nelle fasi di implementazione, garantendo qualitĂ  e tempistiche - Fornire formazione agli utenti e fornire supporto continuo su nuovi strumenti, funzionalitĂ  e funzionalitĂ  - Opererai in diverse parti molteplici filoni, dai progetti di trasformazione alle continue evoluzioni e miglioramenti dei sistemi, contribuiscono a iniziative di miglioramento continuo all'interno dell'ecosistema retail. CHI SEI Competenze tecniche e professionali - Solida conoscenza della suite Oracle Retail Xstore (Xstore, Xstore Mobile, Xoffice Cloud) - Buona comprensione delle integrazioni di sistemi all'interno di ecosistemi IT complessi - La conoscenza di Oracle DB e SQL Ă¨ un vantaggio - Conoscenza di OROB / ORCE, Java, XML Ă¨ un vantaggio - Esperienza nella supervisione di progetti di sviluppo software e personalizzazione di sistemi - FamiliaritĂ  con soluzioni cloud e tecnologie di automazione / AI Ă¨ considerata un vantaggio - Esperienza in risoluzione dei problemi, supporto agli utenti e erogazione di formazione - Esperienza 3â€“5 anni di esperienza su Oracle Retail Xstore Suite / soluzioni POS - Esperienza in implementazioni globali, implementazioni di sistemi e progetti di personalizzazione - Esperienza in ambienti complessi, strutturati e dinamici Soft Skills - Forte mentalitĂ  analitica e di problem solving - Eccellenti capacitĂ  di comunicazione e gestione degli stakeholder - CapacitĂ  di lavorare efficacemente in un ambiente globale, Ambiente interfunzionale - Proattivo, strutturato e capace di gestire molteplici prioritĂ  - A suo agio nel lavorare sotto pressione e con tempistiche serrate - Sicuro nel presentare argomenti tecnici sia a pubblico tecnico che non tecnico Formazione - Master in Tecnologie dell'Informazione, Informatica o simili Lingue - Inglese fluente, scritto e parlato (Ă¨ richiesta interazione quotidiana con i mercati internazionali)

Durch seine drei komplementĂ¤ren Marken erreicht der Ermenegildo Zegna Group eine breite Palette von Communities und Marktsegmenten im Hochendmodell, von ZEGNAâ€™s zeitloser Luxus bis zur modernen Anpassung von Thom Browne bis hin zu seduzender Eleganz bei TOM FORD FASHION.
